name: conservation-watershed
title: Conservation Insight — Watershed-Scale Adoption
subtitle: cover-crop adoption trends across Corn Belt HUC8 watersheds
description: A conservation-insight showcase at the watershed scale — a HUC8 choropleth colored by the provider common estimate, the ensemble trend behind it, an overall adoption gauge, and a by-provider comparison.

dataAccesses.name: WatershedKPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(pct),1) AS adoption_pct, COUNT(DISTINCT huc8) AS watershed_count, COUNT(DISTINCT statecode) AS region_count, SUM(acres) AS acres_total FROM v_watershed_adoption

dataAccesses.name: OverallWatershedAdoption
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(pct),1) AS adoption_pct FROM v_watershed_adoption

dataAccesses.name: WatershedAdoptionByHUC8
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT huc8, provider, ROUND(AVG(pct),0) AS pct FROM v_watershed_adoption GROUP BY 1,2

dataAccesses.name: WatershedAdoptionTrend
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT year, provider, ROUND(AVG(pct),1) AS pct FROM v_watershed_trend WHERE ${sinceYear} = '%' OR year >= ${sinceYear} GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: WatershedYears
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT year FROM v_watershed_trend ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: AdoptionByProviderWatershed
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT provider, ROUND(AVG(pct),1) AS pct FROM v_watershed_adoption GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

kpis.label: Watershed Adoption Rate
kpis.info: Common-estimate adoption rate across all watersheds and providers.

kpis.label: Watersheds Covered
kpis.info: Distinct HUC8 subbasins represented in the sample.

kpis.label: States Represented
kpis.info: Corn Belt states with at least one reporting watershed.

kpis.label: Enrolled Acres
kpis.info: Total acreage covered across every tracked watershed.

panels.title: Cover-crop Adoption by Watershed (HUC8)
panels.info: Median adoption rate across the selected providers, at the HUC8 watershed scale.

panels.title: Adoption Trend by Provider
panels.sub: responds to the Since-year filter above
panels.info: Each provider's trend against the common estimate, 2015–2025.

panels.title: Overall Watershed Adoption
panels.info: Blended adoption rate across every watershed and provider.

panels.title: Adoption by Provider
panels.info: Each provider's own estimate of the overall watershed adoption rate.
